tool_calls.query: Ascend C API support for matrix multiplication (GEMM) on Ascend 910/910B: MatMul/Cube APIs, TPipe/TQue usage, DataCopy, LocalTensor operations, and tiling patterns for 2D tensors.
tool_calls.response:
=== TOP 1 ===
[current]
----- [seq=1279, part=1] -----

5.2.1.24 IterateNBatch
Function Description
When IterateNBatch is called once, IterateBatch computation is performed for N
times to compute N multi-batch matrix C with a size of singleCoreM ×
singleCoreN.
For the BSNGD, SBNGD, and BNGS1S2 layouts, before calling this API, you need to
use SetALayout, SetBLayout, SetCLayout, and SetBatchNum in tiling to set the
layout axis information and maximum number of batches for matrices A, B, and C.
Fo...

tool_calls.query: Ascend C Matmul high-level API usage and passing TCubeTiling to kernels
tool_calls.response:
=== TOP 1 ===
[current]
----- [seq=1301, part=1] -----

5.2.2.1.1 Instructions for Use
Ascend C provides a group of Matmul tiling APIs for users to obtain tiling
parameters required for Matmul kernel computation. You only need to input
information about the matrices A, B, and C and call the corresponding APIs to
obtain related parameters in the TCubeTiling structure in 5.2.1.12 Init.
Matmul tiling APIs are classified into Matmul single-core tiling APIs, multi-core
tiling APIs, and BatchMatmul ti...
